revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
adding to category 8, need to re-add redirecting to it later
revision.text: #redirect[[Lua sidebar/sandbox]][[Category:Confirmed wikipedia redirects 8]][[en:Module:Lua sidebar/sandbox]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Images]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects L
removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
